content: Next.js+MDX hydration mismatches commonly come from browser-only APIs (window, Date.now, locale formatting) rendered differently server vs client, from stray whitespace/extra blank lines in MDX between paragraphs, and from controlled inputs whose initial value depends on browser-only data. Fix: dynamic(() => import(...), { ssr: false }) for browser-dependent demo components, or MDXRemote's lazy hydration option.
